generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer for accurate temperature sensing"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQEnabler, ScipyEnabler, RaspberryPi4
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B as embedded control system for data acquisition and processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationsService
]

instance RabbitMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server for reliable message queuing between components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ScipyEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for numerical optimization of control strategies"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService, StateEstimationService
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD representation of the incubator structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4, ScipyEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Differential equations modeling thermal dynamics of the incubator, calibrated using non-linear least squares solver"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyEnabler
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring to assess safety and optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyInsight, AdjustHeatbedAction
]

instance PredictiveSimulationsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulations of the Physical Twin's behavior under current operating conditions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection using specialized algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation to infer system states from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization through algorithms such as supervisory controllers and optimisers"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SafetyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Safety status of the incubator system"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal performance metrics for the incubator system"
]

instance FaultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of faults in the incubator system"
]

instance StateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Inferred system states from sensor data"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted behavior of the incubator system under current conditions"
]

instance AdjustHeatbedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust heatbed temperature to maintain target temperature"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustFanAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust fan speed for air circulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance IncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Styrofoam box for thermal insulation of incubator system"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensor
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for heating in incubator system"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for air circulation in incubator system"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates modeling, simulation, monitoring, and optimization technologies via calibration algorithms that update models of the Cyber-Physical System and environment using sensor data to estimate parameters, monitors that evaluate system safety and optimal performance, and human or algorithmic decision processes that initiate changes to the Physical Twin when violations are detected."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Calibration algorithms update cyber-physical system (CPS) and environmental models with parameter estimates derived from sensor data. Monitors verify system safety and optimality, while fault detectors and state estimators within algorithms detect anomalies and correct errors."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "In order to keep the device in a safe state, a safe protocol is incorporated into the low-level driver."
]
